name: Jicama Slaw (Hl)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the orange, pineapple, lemon, and lime juices in a saucepan.
2. Reduce the mixture on medium heat until it becomes a glaze, which should take approximately 20-25 minutes.
3. Allow the glaze to cool for about 20 minutes.
4. Once cooled, stir the glaze into the shredded jicama and carrot.
Yield: 4-6 servings (2 tablespoons)
